Pagination info. %first% = first item, %last% = last item, %total% = total items
Shared UI button or label, used across multiple pages

trans-unit.target: Expanded Decks — Shared Pokemon TCG Deck Library
trans-unit.note: HTML page title for anonymous homepage
Homepage hero banner

trans-unit.target: A shared library of physical Pokemon TCG decks for the Expanded format. Browse available decks, borrow them for events, and manage your collection.
trans-unit.note: Homepage hero banner

trans-unit.target: {0}%count% upcoming events|{1}%count% upcoming event|]1,Inf[%count% upcoming events
trans-unit.note: Pluralized label below event count on homepage. %count% = number of events

trans-unit.target: {0}%count% decks in the library|{1}%count% deck in the library|]1,Inf[%count% decks in the library
trans-unit.note: Pluralized label below deck count on homepage. %count% = number of decks
Homepage call-to-action button
Homepage call-to-action button
HTML page title for dashboard
Dashboard greeting. %name% = user screen name
Dashboard section heading
Dashboard section heading
Dashboard section heading for events where user is staff
Dashboard section heading
Dashboard section heading
Dashboard section heading

trans-unit.target: You don't own any decks yet.

Empty state message shown when no items exist
Empty state message shown when no items exist
Empty state message shown when no items exist
Empty state message shown when no items exist

Page heading for deck edit. %name% = deck name
Page heading for deck list import. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Paste your PTCG-format deck list below. This will create version %version%.

Deck list import UI
Submit button on new deck form
Submit button on edit deck form
Deck list import UI
Button to retire a deck
Button to reactivate a retired deck

trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to retire this deck? It will no longer be available for borrowing.
trans-unit.note: Confirmation dialog when retiring a deck

trans-unit.target: This deck has %count% active borrow(s). Pending requests will be automatically cancelled. Ongoing borrows will continue to completion. Retire this deck?
trans-unit.note: Confirmation dialog when retiring a deck with active borrows. %count% = number of active borrows
Deck list textarea form field
Deck list textarea form field

trans-unit.target: Paste a deck list to import it immediately. Leave empty to add one later.

Empty state when no deck list has been imported
Call-to-action button to import a deck list
Label in deck detail info. Includes trailing colon
Label in deck detail info. Includes trailing colon

Status badge on deck card

trans-unit.target: This deck has active event registrations and cannot be unpublished.

Toggle button to show/hide extra catalog filters on mobile
Badge label indicating active filters

Badge label for deck played at event
Badge label for deck with active borrow at event

Badge label for deck not registered at event
Link to full borrow history. %count% = total borrow count
Breadcrumb label for deck borrow history page
Page title for deck borrow history. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: No borrow activity for this deck.

Link button on deck detail page
Page title for deck version history. %name% = deck name
Table header for version number

Badge label for the current version

trans-unit.target: This deck has no version history yet.

Section title for version comparison tool
Label for the "from" version selector
Label for the "to" version selector
Badge for cards added in version comparison
Badge for cards removed in version comparison

Toggle button to reveal unchanged cards
Message when two compared versions have no differences

trans-unit.target: No public events to discover right now.

Page heading or button for creating a new event
Page heading or button for creating a new event
Page heading for event edit. %name% = event name
Submit button on new event form
Submit button on edit event form
Button to cancel an event

trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to cancel this event? This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.note: JavaScript confirm dialog when cancelling an event
Navigation link back to event list
Navigation link back to event detail
Status badge shown when event is cancelled
Status badge shown when event is finished
Badge shown when event is invitation-only

trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to mark this event as finished?
trans-unit.note: JavaScript confirm dialog when finishing an event
Table header label in event detail
Table header label in event detail
Tooltip label shown before user's local time conversion for event dates
Table header label in event detail
Table header label in event detail
Table header label in event detail
Table header label in event detail
Table header label for tournament structure
Table header label for min/max attendees
Min attendees display. %count% = minimum number
Max attendees display. %count% = maximum number
Table header label
Round duration display. %duration% = minutes
Top cut round duration. %duration% = minutes
Table header label for entry fee
Table header label
Empty state when no upcoming events
Visibility option: event visible to everyone
Visibility option: event not yet ready, only visible to staff and invited users
Visibility option: event only visible to staff and invited users
Organizer attribution. %name% = organizer screen name

trans-unit.target: Community tool — not an official service
trans-unit.note: Legal notice shown on event create/edit forms

trans-unit.target: Expanded Decks is an independent community project designed to promote the Expanded format and make it easier for new players to try it by borrowing decks at events. This tool does not replace or compete with official Pokemon Organized Play services. By creating or updating an event here, you confirm that you will comply with all official Pokemon tournament rules and policies. The tournament ID is used solely for cross-referencing — this platform has no affiliation with The Pokemon Company.
trans-unit.note: Legal notice shown on event create/edit forms

trans-unit.target: Events created here are meant for friendly, community-driven tournaments. Please ensure your event follows the Pokémon Organized Play guidelines and fosters a welcoming atmosphere for all players.
trans-unit.note: Legal notice shown on event create/edit forms
Staff management section on event detail
Staff management section on event detail
Staff management section on event detail
Staff management section on event detail

trans-unit.target: Screen name, email, or Pokemon ID

Participation section on event detail
Participation section on event detail

Participation section on event detail

Brand name in footer copyright line
Generic CSRF token error shown on form submissions
Flash error when a deck ID does not exist
Flash error when a borrower user ID does not exist
Success flash after submitting a borrow request. %name% = deck name
Success flash after approving a borrow request
Success flash after denying a borrow request
Success flash after confirming deck hand-off
Success flash after confirming deck return
Success flash after cancelling a borrow
Success flash after returning deck to owner (staff delegation)
Success flash after creating an event. %name% = event name
Success flash after editing an event. %name% = event name
Success flash after cancelling an event. %name% = event name
Warning when trying to cancel an already-cancelled event

trans-unit.target: A cancelled event cannot be edited.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to edit a cancelled event

trans-unit.target: Decks cannot be browsed for a cancelled or finished event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to browse available decks for a cancelled/finished event

trans-unit.target: Register as a participant to browse and borrow decks.
trans-unit.note: Warning when non-participant tries to browse decks

trans-unit.target: You must be a participant to select a deck.
trans-unit.note: Warning when non-participant tries to select a deck

trans-unit.target: Deck selection is not available for cancelled or finished events.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to select deck for cancelled/finished event

trans-unit.target: Deck selection cannot be changed after the event has started.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to change deck after event started
Success flash after clearing deck selection

trans-unit.target: This deck is not available for selection.
trans-unit.note: Error when selected deck is not playable
Success flash after selecting a deck to play. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Cannot register for a cancelled event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to register for a cancelled event
Error for unknown participation mode value

trans-unit.target: Your deck selection has been cleared.
trans-unit.note: Info flash when deck selection is auto-cleared (mode switch or withdrawal)

trans-unit.target: You are now registered as a player.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after registering as player

trans-unit.target: You are now registered as a spectator.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after registering as spectator

trans-unit.target: Cannot withdraw from a cancelled event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to withdraw from a cancelled event

trans-unit.target: You have withdrawn from this event.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after withdrawing from event

trans-unit.target: You marked yourself as interested in this event.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after marking interest

trans-unit.target: You are already engaged with this event.
trans-unit.note: Info flash when user is already engaged

trans-unit.target: %name% has been invited to this event.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after inviting a user

trans-unit.target: %name% is already engaged with this event.
trans-unit.note: Info flash when inviting already engaged user

trans-unit.target: Cannot invite participants to a cancelled or finished event.
trans-unit.note: Warning flash when trying to invite to ended event

trans-unit.target: This event is invitation only. Only invited trainers can register as players.
trans-unit.note: Warning flash when non-invited user tries to register as player on invitation-only event

trans-unit.target: Cannot assign staff to a cancelled event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to assign staff to a cancelled event
Warning when staff search query matches no user. %name% = search query

trans-unit.target: The organizer cannot be assigned as staff.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to add organizer as staff
Warning when user is already staff. %name% = screen name

trans-unit.target: "%name%" has been added to the staff team.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after adding staff. %name% = screen name

trans-unit.target: Cannot remove staff from a cancelled event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to remove staff from a cancelled event

trans-unit.target: "%name%" has been removed from the staff team.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after removing staff. %name% = screen name

trans-unit.target: Cannot change registration for a cancelled or finished event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to toggle deck registration for cancelled/finished event

trans-unit.target: You can only manage registration for your own decks.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to register another user's deck
Success flash after registering a deck. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Cannot unregister "%name%" — it has an active borrow at this event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when deck has active borrow. %name% = deck name
Success flash after unregistering a deck. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Cannot change delegation for a cancelled or finished event.
trans-unit.note: Warning when trying to toggle delegation for cancelled/finished event

trans-unit.target: You can only manage delegation for your own decks.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to delegate another user's deck

trans-unit.target: "%name%" must be registered before enabling delegation.
trans-unit.note: Warning when deck is not registered. %name% = deck name
Success flash after enabling staff delegation. %name% = deck name
Success flash after disabling staff delegation. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Cannot revoke delegation for "%name%" — the deck is currently with staff. Staff must return it first.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to revoke delegation while deck is in staff custody. %name% = deck name
Success flash after owner hands deck to staff. %name% = deck name
Success flash after staff returns deck to owner. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: "%name%" returned to you. All active borrows have been closed.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after owner reclaims deck. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Walk-up lending is not available for cancelled or finished events.
trans-unit.note: Warning when walk-up lending blocked by event state
Success flash after walk-up lend. %deck% = deck name, %borrower% = borrower screen name

trans-unit.target: Event "%name%" has been marked as finished.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after marking event as finished. %name% = event name

trans-unit.target: This event has already been marked as finished.
trans-unit.note: Warning flash when trying to finish an already-finished event

trans-unit.target: Cannot mark a cancelled event as finished.
trans-unit.note: Warning flash when trying to finish a cancelled event

trans-unit.target: Deck "%name%" created with deck list imported.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after creating deck with inline list. %name% = deck name
Success flash after creating deck without list. %name% = deck name
Success flash after editing a deck. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Deck list imported (version %version%, %cards% cards). Card enrichment is processing in the background.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after importing deck list. %version% = version number, %cards% = card count
Success flash after retiring a deck. %name% = deck name
Success flash after reactivating a deck. %name% = deck name

trans-unit.target: Deck "%name%" has been retired. %count% pending borrow request(s) were automatically cancelled.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after retiring a deck that had pending borrows. %name% = deck name, %count% = cancelled count

trans-unit.target: This deck is currently lent and cannot be retired.
trans-unit.note: Error flash when trying to retire a deck that is currently lent

trans-unit.target: Line %line%: card line found before any section header: "%content%"
trans-unit.note: Parse error when a card line appears before a section (Pokémon/Trainer/Energy) header. %line% = line number, %content% = raw line
Parse error for a line that matches neither a section header nor a card line. %line% = line number, %content% = raw line

trans-unit.target: A deck must contain exactly %required% cards, but this list has %actual%.
trans-unit.note: Validation error for wrong card count. %required% = expected count (60), %actual% = actual count

trans-unit.target: Card "%name%" appears %count% times, but the maximum is %max% copies.
trans-unit.note: Validation error for exceeding copy limit. %name% = card name, %count% = actual copies, %max% = maximum allowed

trans-unit.target: Card "%name%" (%set% %number%) is banned in the Expanded format.
trans-unit.note: Validation error for banned card. %name% = card name, %set% = set code, %number% = card number

trans-unit.target: Your account has been created. Please check your email to verify your address.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after registration

trans-unit.target: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent.
trans-unit.note: Anti-enumeration success flash for password reset request
Error when reset token does not match any user

trans-unit.target: This password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
trans-unit.note: Error when reset token has expired

trans-unit.target: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with your new password.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after password reset

trans-unit.target: If an account exists with that email and is not yet verified, a new verification email has been sent.
trans-unit.note: Anti-enumeration success flash for verification resend
Error when verification token does not match any user

trans-unit.target: This verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
trans-unit.note: Error when verification token has expired

trans-unit.target: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.
trans-unit.note: Success flash after email verification
Profile page heading
Profile form submit button
Success flash after saving profile
Form label for deck name field
Form label for notes textarea
Form label for public checkbox
Form label for inline deck list on creation
Form label for deck list import
Form label for event name field
Form label for tournament ID field
Form label for event format field (always Expanded)
Form label for event start datetime
Form label for event end datetime
Form label for timezone selector
Form label for event location field
Form label for event description textarea
Form label for event registration URL
Form label for tournament structure selector
Form label for minimum attendees
Form label for maximum attendees
Form label for round duration

trans-unit.target: Top cut round duration in minutes (optional)
trans-unit.note: Form label for top cut round duration
Form label for entry fee amount
Form label for entry fee currency
Form label for decklist mandatory checkbox
Form label for invitation-only checkbox
Form label for event visibility selector
Form label for email field
Form label for first name field
Form label for last name field
Form label for screen name field
Form label for player ID field
Form label for preferred locale selector
Form label for password field
Form label for password confirmation field
Form label for new password field
Form label for new password confirmation field
Form label for terms agreement checkbox
Placeholder example for deck name input
Placeholder for notes textarea
Placeholder example for event name input
Placeholder example for tournament ID input

trans-unit.target: e.g. Le Repaire du Dragon, Lyon
trans-unit.note: Placeholder example for event location input
Placeholder for event description textarea
Default placeholder for dropdown selectors
Placeholder example for round duration input
Placeholder example for top cut duration input
Placeholder example for entry fee input
Email greeting with recipient screen name

trans-unit.target: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
trans-unit.note: Fallback text before raw URL in emails

trans-unit.target: Expanded Decks — Shared Pokemon TCG deck library
trans-unit.note: Email footer tagline
Verification email subject line
Verification email heading

trans-unit.target: Thank you for registering. Please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
trans-unit.note: Verification email body text
Verification email CTA button

trans-unit.target: This link will expire in %hours% hour(s).
trans-unit.note: Verification email expiry notice

trans-unit.target: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
trans-unit.note: Verification email ignore notice
Password reset email subject line
Password reset email heading

trans-unit.target: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to choose a new one:
trans-unit.note: Password reset email body text
Password reset email CTA button

trans-unit.target: This link will expire in %minutes% minute(s).
trans-unit.note: Password reset email expiry notice

trans-unit.target: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
trans-unit.note: Password reset email ignore notice
Borrow request email subject
Borrow request email heading

trans-unit.target: %borrower% wants to borrow your deck "%deck%" for the event %event%.
trans-unit.note: Borrow request email body
Label before borrower's note in email
Borrow request email CTA button

trans-unit.target: Your borrow request for "%deck%" was approved
trans-unit.note: Borrow approval email subject
Borrow approval email heading

trans-unit.target: Your request to borrow "%deck%" for the event %event% has been approved.
trans-unit.note: Borrow approval email body

trans-unit.target: The deck will be handed off to you at the event.
trans-unit.note: Borrow approval email handoff notice
Borrow notification CTA button

trans-unit.target: Your borrow request for "%deck%" was denied
trans-unit.note: Borrow denial email subject
Borrow denial email heading

trans-unit.target: Unfortunately, your request to borrow "%deck%" for the event %event% has been denied.
trans-unit.note: Borrow denial email body

trans-unit.target: You can browse other available decks for this event.
trans-unit.note: Borrow denial email browse suggestion
Borrow notification CTA button (details)
Borrow overdue email subject
Borrow overdue email heading

trans-unit.target: The deck "%deck%" borrowed for the event %event% is overdue for return.
trans-unit.note: Borrow overdue email body

trans-unit.target: Please arrange for the deck to be returned as soon as possible.
trans-unit.note: Borrow overdue email action prompt
Borrow cancellation email subject
Borrow cancellation email heading

trans-unit.target: The borrow of "%deck%" for the event %event% has been cancelled by %actor%.
trans-unit.note: Borrow cancellation email body
CTA button text in event notification emails

trans-unit.target: You have been assigned as staff for "%event%"
trans-unit.note: Email subject when assigned as event staff
Email heading for staff assignment

trans-unit.target: You have been assigned as a staff member for the event "%event%".
trans-unit.note: Email body for staff assignment
Email subject when event details changed
Email heading for event update

trans-unit.target: The event "%event%" has been updated. Please check the event page for the latest details.
trans-unit.note: Email body for event update
Email subject when event is cancelled
Email heading for event cancellation

trans-unit.target: The event "%event%" has been cancelled. Any pending borrows related to this event will be automatically cancelled.
trans-unit.note: Email body for event cancellation
Email subject for event invitation
Email heading for event invitation

trans-unit.target: %organizer% has invited you to the event "%event%".
trans-unit.note: Email body for event invitation
In-app notification title for staff assignment

trans-unit.target: You have been assigned as staff for "%event%".
trans-unit.note: In-app notification message for staff assignment
In-app notification title for event update
In-app notification message for event update
In-app notification title for event cancellation
In-app notification message for event cancellation
In-app notification title for event invitation
In-app notification message for event invitation
User dropdown menu link
Page title for notification preferences

trans-unit.target: Choose which notifications you want to receive by email and/or in-app.
trans-unit.note: Description text on notification preferences page
Group heading for borrow notification types
Group heading for event notification types
Table column header
Table column header
Table column header
Submit button on notification preferences form
Notification type label

trans-unit.target: Your notification preferences have been saved.
trans-unit.note: Flash message after saving notification preferences

trans-unit.target: Invalid security token. Please try again.

Results page title
Results table header: placement
Results table header: player
Results table header: match record
Results table header: archetype
Results table header: deck

trans-unit.target: No results have been entered yet.
trans-unit.note: Results page: no results message
Edit results page title
Edit results: save button
Button: view tournament results
Button: edit tournament results
Button: enter tournament results
Edit results: match record placeholder
Button label for syncing event data from Pokemon event page

trans-unit.target: Fetch event details from the official Pokemon event page
trans-unit.note: Tooltip for the sync button

trans-unit.target: Please enter a Tournament ID first.
trans-unit.note: Error when tournament ID field is empty

trans-unit.target: This field already has a value. Overwrite?
trans-unit.note: Confirmation prompt when synced value differs from existing
Success message after sync

trans-unit.target: All fields already filled. No changes made.
trans-unit.note: Message when sync finds no new data to fill

trans-unit.target: Network error. Could not reach the server.
trans-unit.note: Error when API call fails
Flash message after saving results

trans-unit.target: Results can only be viewed for finished events.
trans-unit.note: Flash message when event is not finished
Notification center page title
Button to mark a single notification as read
Button to mark all notifications as read
Link to full notification list page
Empty state message
Link to notification preferences
Button to delete a single notification
Button to delete all read notifications

trans-unit.target: Delete all read notifications? This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.note: Confirmation prompt for bulk delete
Profile section title for data export

trans-unit.target: Download a copy of all your personal data (profile, decks, borrows, events) as a JSON file.
trans-unit.note: Profile data export description
Button to download personal data export
Profile section title for account deletion

trans-unit.target: Request permanent deletion of your account. A confirmation email will be sent. Once confirmed, all your personal data will be anonymized and you will no longer be able to log in.
trans-unit.note: Profile account deletion description
Button to request account deletion

trans-unit.target: Are you sure? A confirmation email will be sent to finalize the deletion.
trans-unit.note: Confirmation prompt for account deletion request

trans-unit.target: You cannot delete your account while you have active borrows (pending, approved, lent, or overdue). Please settle all borrows first.
trans-unit.note: Error when user tries to delete account with unsettled borrows

trans-unit.target: A confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox to finalize account deletion.
trans-unit.note: Flash message after requesting account deletion
Flash message for invalid deletion token

trans-unit.target: This deletion link has expired. Please request a new one from your profile.
trans-unit.note: Flash message for expired deletion token

trans-unit.target: Your account has been permanently deleted and all personal data has been anonymized.
trans-unit.note: Flash message after successful account deletion

trans-unit.target: Confirm your account deletion — Expanded Decks
trans-unit.note: Subject line for account deletion confirmation email
Heading in deletion confirmation email

trans-unit.target: You have requested to delete your Expanded Decks account. Click the button below to confirm. This action is irreversible — all your personal data will be permanently anonymized.
trans-unit.note: Body text in deletion confirmation email
CTA button in deletion confirmation email
Expiry notice in deletion confirmation email

trans-unit.target: If you did not request this, simply ignore this email. Your account will remain active.
trans-unit.note: Ignore notice in deletion confirmation email
Admin dropdown link to user management
Admin dropdown link to archetype management

Admin archetype edit page title. %name% = archetype name

trans-unit.target: Markdown description for the archetype detail page...

trans-unit.target: Supports Markdown formatting. This content will appear on the archetype detail page.

Admin archetype meta description field label
Admin archetype pokemon slugs field label
Admin archetype pokemon slugs placeholder

trans-unit.target: Comma-separated Pokemon slugs for sprite display (e.g. iron-thorns, mew). Sprites will appear next to the archetype name.

Flash after updating archetype. %name% = archetype name
Flash after creating archetype. %name% = archetype name

Actions section title on user detail page
Button to disable a user account
Button to re-enable a disabled user account
Button to anonymize a user account (GDPR)

trans-unit.target: Disable this user account? They will no longer be able to log in.
trans-unit.note: Confirmation prompt for disabling a user

trans-unit.target: Anonymize this user? All personal data will be permanently erased. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.note: Confirmation prompt for anonymizing a user
Flash message after disabling a user
Flash message after enabling a user
Flash message after anonymizing a user
Warning when trying to anonymize an already anonymized user

trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to delete this page?
Are you sure you want to delete this category?
Optional — overrides canonical slug for this locale
This page is not published yet. Only editors can see it.
This slug is already in use.
Slug must only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
A translation already exists for this locale.
No pages in this category yet.
